reasoning: Order is marked Complete with the correct item (Sample Product, SKU PRODUCT-001) shipped and paid in full. There is no evidence on the order of a wrong item being sent. Additionally, a system FRAUD ALERT indicates the customer has an extreme refund history (16 refunds in 33 days, 90% refund rate) with prior claims disproven by tracking, and explicitly instructs to escalate to Loss Prevention and not process refunds. Per policy and risk controls, this request must be escalated.
